output.code:
# Read the file content and show a snippet with indices to help compute spans
path = "/mnt/data/file-Ez6b7SxGzvnBZkEoT9qFgg-Q073.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

# Show some basic info
length = len(text)
print("Total length:", length)

# Print the content (ensure it's visible to us); also store for later processing
print(text)

# Compute the span for the quoted verse in the file.
text_path = "/mnt/data/file-Ez6b7SxGzvnBZkEoT9qFgg-Q073.txt"
with open(text_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

# Find the first double-quote after the "سورة النساء (4:23)" marker
marker = "سورة النساء (4:23):"
marker_idx = text.find(marker)
first_quote_idx = text.find('"', marker_idx if marker_idx != -1 else 0)

# Find the closing quote after that
closing_quote_idx = text.find('"', first_quote_idx + 1) if first_quote_idx != -1 else -1

if first_quote_idx == -1:
    span_start = None
    span_end = None
    span_text = None
else:
    span_start = first_quote_idx + 1  # exclude the opening quote
    span_end = closing_quote_idx if closing_quote_idx != -1 else len(text)  # exclude closing quote if present, else EOF
    span_text = text[span_start:span_end]

print({
    "span_start": span_start,
    "span_end": span_end,
    "span_text_preview": span_text[:120] + ("..." if len(span_text) > 120 else ""),
    "has_closing_quote": closing_quote_idx != -1
})

queries: What is the full Arabic text of Quran Surah An-Nisa 4:23?
النص القرآني: حرمت عليكم أمهاتكم وبناتكم وأخواتكم وخالاتكم 4:23

# For precision, print the exact span text and its length using repr to observe any trailing whitespace/newlines.
text_path = "/mnt/data/file-Ez6b7SxGzvnBZkEoT9qFgg-Q073.txt"
with open(text_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
marker = "سورة النساء (4:23):"
first_quote_idx = text.find('"', text.find(marker))
closing_quote_idx = text.find('"', first_quote_idx + 1)

span_start = first_quote_idx + 1
span_end = closing_quote_idx if closing_quote_idx != -1 else len(text)
span_text = text[span_start:span_end]

print("span_start:", span_start, "span_end:", span_end, "length:", len(span_text))
print("repr:", repr(span_text[-80:]))

# Print the full span_text so we can copy it precisely into the final JSON
text_path = "/mnt/data/file-Ez6b7SxGzvnBZkEoT9qFgg-Q073.txt"
with open(text_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
marker = "سورة النساء (4:23):"
first_quote_idx = text.find('"', text.find(marker))
closing_quote_idx = text.find('"', first_quote_idx + 1)
span_start = first_quote_idx + 1
span_end = closing_quote_idx if closing_quote_idx != -1 else len(text)
span_text = text[span_start:span_end]
print(span_text)

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":280,"span_end":958,"span_text":"ولا ت结婚وا النساء من أهلِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم، ولا أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِ أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا بناتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِكُم من أمهاتِكُم، ولا أخواتِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":23},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمْ أُمَّهَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ وَعَمَّاتُكُمْ وَخَالَاتُكُمْ وَبَنَاتُ الْأَخِ وَبَنَاتُ الْأُخْتِ وَأُمَّهَاتُكُمُ اللَّاتِي أَرْضَعْنَكُمْ وَأَخَوَاتُكُمْ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ وَأُمَّهَاتُ نِسَائِكُمْ وَرَبَائِبُكُمُ اللَّاتِي فِي حُجُورِكُمْ مِنْ نِسَائِكُمُ اللَّاتِي دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُونُوا دَخَلْتُمْ بِهِنَّ فَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَحَلَائِلُ أَبْنَائِكُمُ الَّذِينَ مِنْ أَصْلَابِكُمْ وَأَنْ تَجْمَعُوا بَيْنَ الْأُخْتَيْنِ إِلَّا مَا قَدْ سَلَفَ ۗ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
